title: Original baseline analysis
source_description: Statistical analysis generated from n8n_DCC.xlsx / Answers worksheet
headline: NN Insurance is the most frequently mentioned insurer in the tested AI answers.
strategic_reading: NN starts from a strong AI visibility position: it ranks first by raw mention volume and appears in a largely positive context. However, model-level and prompt-level behavior differs, and competitors are still close. The next opportunity is to improve the quality of presence: make NN more product-specific, more credible, more citable and more actionable.

kpis.label: Prompt coverage
kpis.sub: prompts mention NN at least once

model_readout.interpretation: Often mentions NN in generic, list-based answers. Useful for awareness, but less product-specific.
Produces the richest NN context in the original benchmark, including more product-specific and price/fee-related references.
Mentions NN often, but many mentions appear in neutral tables or comparative structures with lower product detail.

limitations: Sentiment is keyword-based, not a full contextual sentiment interpretation.
Shared lists do not always imply a true recommendation.
The prompt set influences model behavior.
Repeated Google narratives may inflate some repeated mention patterns.
deck_takeaway: NN is already visible, but visibility alone is not enough. The recommendations should focus on turning mentions into product-specific, credible and actionable next steps.
